title: COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS - 211info
text: DEVNW SPRINGFIELD COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides small loans to people and businesses. Includes auto, consumer, credit-builder, micro, and small business loans. Also offers affordable housing finance and small business equity investments. 212 Main Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 345-0446 1 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 345-0446 ext 1 Lynn Meyer [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for application or screening FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Services: Business Development Personal Loans Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT - FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEVNW SPRINGFIELD
